task_completion.description: Verify the Dial Method is set to RATIO
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a dropdown or input field labeled 'Dial Method' on the campaign settings page and verify its value is 'RATIO'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Auto Dial Level is set to 1.5
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a dropdown or input field labeled 'Auto Dial Level' and verify its value is '1.5'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Hopper Level is set to 500
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an input field labeled 'Hopper Level' and verify its value is '500'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Dial Timeout is set to 26
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an input field labeled 'Dial Timeout' and verify its value is '26'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Campaign Recording is set to ALLCALLS
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a dropdown or input field labeled 'Campaign Recording' and verify its value is 'ALLCALLS'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Drop Call Seconds is set to 5
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an input field labeled 'Drop Call Seconds' and verify its value is '5'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Campaign Caller ID is set to 2125551000
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an input field labeled 'Campaign Caller ID' and verify its value is '2125551000'.

integrity.description: The agent used the web-based GUI to configure the dialer settings
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser interacting with a dialer administration interface (like Vicidial), not a terminal window executing SQL commands.

integrity.description: The agent modified the correct campaign (SALESOUT)
integrity.visual_evidence: The campaign ID 'SALESOUT' or 'Sales Outbound Campaign' should be visible at the top of the settings page or in the URL/breadcrumbs.

integrity.description: The agent entered the values into genuine application form fields
integrity.visual_evidence: The values must be entered into the actual HTML form fields of the dialer software, not typed into a text editor, notepad, or a mock HTML file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target campaign ID is 'SALESOUT'. The expected configuration values are: Dial Method = RATIO, Auto Dial Level = 1.5, Hopper Level = 500, Dial Timeout = 26, Campaign Recording = ALLCALLS, Drop Call Seconds = 5, and Campaign Caller ID = 2125551000.
